title: pisum sativum var. elatius
intro: Pisum sativum var. elatius, also known as tall garden pea, is a variety of the garden pea plant that is characterized by its tall growth habit and larger seeds compared to the standard garden pea. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and reducing oxidative stress. The health benefits of Pisum sativum var. elatius include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve heart health, and support digestive health due to its high fiber content. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by drying and steeping the leaves and seeds in hot water, and are often used to promote overall well-being and relaxation.
